title: Realismos
description: A modpack for Minecraft 1.20.4 focusing on fun realism in Minecraft.
body:
The Realismos modpack is a combination of mods and resource packs to transform Minecraft 1.20.4 into a realistic, yet fun, playing experience!

Realismos changes Minecraft's world generation, visual details, and gameplay functions - all while improving performance - to give a more realistic playing experience.

Watch the creation of the modpack here!
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/vODglApwlTw" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


<details>
<summary>Mods</summary>

- Ad Astra (introduces space travel)

- Boids (fish swim in schools)

- Camera Overhaul (realistic first-person player movement)

- Cave Dust (dust particles float through caves)

- CCME (performance improvements)

- Crawl (adds crawling functionality)

- Danger Close (sharp/fiery blocks damage players)

- Distant Horizons (allows viewing of distant chunks with low render distances)

- Duckling (adds ducks)

- Dynamic Surroundings (provides realistic atmospheric sounds and effects)

- Eating Animation (eating animation now includes "bites")

- Enderman Overhaul (adds new enderman models)

- Falling Leaves (leaf particles fall from trees)

- First-person Model (makes player model visible in first person)

- Hardcore Torches (torches have a finite lifespan)

- Immersive Portals (portals allow you to view between dimensions)

- Incendium (revamped Nether world generation)

- Indium (performance improvements)

- Iris Shaders (enables the usage of shaders)

- Lithium (performance improvements)

- Make Bubbles Pop (various improvements to water bubbles)

- Mobs Attempt Parkour (allows mobs to cross gaps when tracking players)

- More Axolotl Variants (adds new axolotl models)

- More Mob Variants (adds new models for various mobs)

- Nether Weather (adds various weather patterns to the Nether)

- Neutral Animals (all mobs are neutral by default, fighting back if you attack)

- Not Enough Animations (realistic third-person player movement)

- Nullscape (revamped End world generation)

- Nyf's Spiders (allows spiders to scale walls)

- Panda's Falling Trees (trees fall when chopped)

- Passable Foliage (removes leaf collision)

- Physics Mod (adds realistic physics and weather)

- Realistic Bees (various changes to bee sizing and homes)

- Realistic Rowing (improved rowing animations/functionality)

- Serious Player Animations (realistic third-person player movement)

- Sodium (performance improvements)

- Spawn Animations (hostile mobs rise from the grave or puff into existence)

- Spiders Produce Webs (spiders leave behind cobwebs while moving)

- Step Up (allows you walk uphill without jumping)

- Steve's Realistic Sleep (watch the night pass while in bed)

- Terralith (revamped Overworld generation)

- Visual Overhaul (enhances visual detail with utility blocks)

- WF's Cave Overhaul (revamped cave generation)

- Wilder Wild (introduces new mobs and blocks based on real life)

- YUNG's Mods (various improvements to generated structures)
</details>


<details>
<summary>Notes</summary>

Cave Dust's 1.20.4 version is not yet available on Modrinth, and you may have trouble launching the modpack with it. Use [this version](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cave-dust/files/5040250/dependencies) instead!

Immersive Portals and Hardcore Torches are not compatible with Replay Mod. For all the creators out there, make sure you remove them before recording any replays!

Neutral Animals has some serious crash issues in my testing (likely due to being built for 1.20.1, rather than 1.20.4), so consider disabling it if you run into errors.

No resource pack or shaders are included with this modpack - however, it was built with the usage of [Complementary Unbound](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-unbound) and [Stratum](https://continuum.graphics/stratum-resourcepack/) in mind.

Only Physics Mod Lite is included with this modpack for licensing reasons - you can download Physics Mod Pro for free on [Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/Haubna), though donating to them is always appreciated!

There always could be other issues, since many of these mods were not designed for each other, but generally I've found this modpack to be very stable - at reasonable settings - aside from these few issues.
</details>
